subcodes.first_line: O Forgiving Lord! Make Sorush Esfandyar a recipient of Thy bounties and bestow upon him Thy grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار آمرزگار سروش اسفندیار را از بخششت یار بر خوردار فرما و بمان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @soul; spirit after death, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
